Title: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system to Chief Hugh (Chaim) Jacobson
Summary: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system in the town of Ramapo, county of Rockland, to Chief Hugh (Chaim) Jacobson.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the highway law, in relation to dedicating a portion of the state highway system to Chief Hugh (Chaim) Jacobson
